home.subtitle: Te ao tuhituhi kore-mutunga
home.emptyTagline: Ko tō wāhi tuatahi he wāhi kau. Tīpakohia he tauira hei tīmata, rānei tīmata noa mai.
home.tagline: He wāhi māmā mō te tuhituhi roa — kōrero pūrākau, rangahau, tuhinga whakaaro, tuhinga rā.
home.syncOffChip: kāore i whakahohea te tūhono/taurua · ka ngaro ngā raraunga
home.syncOnChip: e tūhono ana ki te kōpaki
home.syncOnBody: Ka tūhono tō mahi ki te kōpaki "{{folder}}" i tēnei pūrere.
home.warningTitle: Hanganga i mua i te whakaputanga
home.warningBody: Kāore he tūhono raraunga. Ko ngā mea katoa kei roto i tō pūtirotiro, ā, mēnā ka ūkuihia tōna kohinga ka ngaro tō mahi. Ka taea e koe te whakahohea te tūhono ki tētahi kōpaki ā-rohe i Ngā Tautuhinga Whānui → Tūhono.

about.title: mō mātou
about.paragraph1: Mō te kaituhi e tīmata ana anō, anō. Te tangata e huaki ana i tētahi tuhinga hou, e tuhituhi ana i ngā rerenga toru (rānei kore), ka noho rawa atu e 40 mīniti ana e āta whakatikatika ana i te momotuhi. Te tangata e tae ana ōna whakaaro pai ki te horo o te pō, ka ngaro. Te tangata whai ana i ngā tapanga tekau mā whā, ngā pukapuka e ono, me tētahi ipu tuhituhi kāore i neke i tētahi marama.
about.paragraph2Before: E mārama ana ahau, nō reira ko ahau tērā
about.paragraph2After: . He ADHD tōku, he Otakiakia, ētahi atu āhua kāore anō kia kitea. Me matua kimi i tētahi mea e mārama ana ki tōku hinengaro pakiaka engari miharo. Tētahi wāhi hei tūkino i ngā mea katoa i mua i tana ngaro (rānei tīmata te tuhituhi). Ngā iti iti, ngā whakaaro haurua, ngā hononga o te horo pō. Katoa, ki tētahi wāhi.
about.paragraph3: Nō reira i hanga ai ahau i tēnei wāhi mō tāua. E tūmanako ana ka riro māu he hari pērā i tāku i hari ai i te hanga.
about.paragraph4Before: Tētahi atu mea... E whakapono ana ahau ki te hangarau hei painga, ā, e kino ana ahau ki te pānui hoko. Nō reira, ka noho tonu tēnei hei wāhi kore-pānui-hoko, KORE UTUNGA mō ngā mahi ā-moni-kore. Ka taea e koe te kopuku, whakarereke rānei i ōu hiahia i raro i te
about.statusValueRest: — kāore he tūhono raraunga. Ko ngā raraunga katoa e tiakina ana ki roto i te IndexedDB o tō pūtirotiro ā-rohe. Mēnā ka ūkuihia tō kohinga pūtirotiro, ka ngaro tō mahi.
about.feedbackBefore: Kei te hanga tonu ahau i tēnei, ā, he nui ōku whakaaro
about.feedbackAfter: . E hiahia ana ahau ki te rongo he aha ngā mea pai, he aha ngā kino, me he aha ōu hiahia. E harikoa ana ki ngā kōrero whakahoki.

language.title: Reo
language.subtitle: Tīpakohia te reo mō te kanohi-mata me ngā tuhinga o te Pokapū Āwhina. Ka huri ngā whakamāoritanga ngaro ki te reo Ingarihi.
language.label: Reo kanohi-mata
language.hint: Ka tūāpōngia ngā hurihanga ā-ohorere, ka tiakina ki tēnei pūtirotiro.
language.machineTranslationNotice: Ko ngā whakamāoritanga, ko te reo Ingarihi anake kāore i hangaia aunoa. Aroha mai mō ngā hapa — tukua mai ōu kōrero whakahoki kia taea ai e mātou te whakatika.

editor.title: Ētita
editor.subtitle: Parekura me ngā āhua tuhituhi. Ka mahi tonu ngā ara Markdown (#, >, -, **) ahakoa ēnei tautuhinga.
editor.floatingToolbarHint: Ka puta i te tōpuni mai rānei i te pāwhiri-matau i te āhua tuhituhi.
editor.rightClickHint: Huri i waenga i te parekura rewa me te tahua horopaki ā-pūtirotiro.
editor.rightClickTooltip: Whakamahia te tahua horopaki ā-pūtirotiro i te pāwhiri-matau engā parekura rewa. Ka tonatona tonu te parekura i te tōpuni-tīpako.
editor.inlineTogglesHint: Ngā pātene Taumaha me Auahi kei roto i te parekura rewa.
editor.inlineTogglesTooltip: Huna i ngā pātene T me A mai i te parekura rewa. Ka mahi tonu ngā ara Markdown (**, _).
editor.listDepthHint: Tōhia te hōhonu e taea ai e ngā rārangi poka me ngā nama te noho.
editor.listDepthTooltip: Whakatauria te pae o te noho kōpae rārangi. Kei te tūtohu ana ki ngā taumata 2 inaianei.
editor.templateDefaultsHint: Ngā huinga āhua rōpū rerekē mō ia tauira.
editor.templateDefaultsTooltip: Tukua ia tauira (kōrero pūrākau, tuhinga rā, hangarau…) ki te tīpako i tōna ake huinga āhua rōpū.

docInspector.title: Tirotiro tuhinga
docInspector.subtitle: Tīpakohia ngā āpure ka puta ki te tirotiro tuhinga. Ka taea ia mea te whakakāti whānuitia, ka taea te huri mō ia wāhi.
docInspector.statusHint: Whakaatu i te āhua o te tuhinga, ārai i ngā tuhinga oti mai i te ētita.
docInspector.wordLimitHint: Whakaatu i te tepe tatau kupu ka taea te tautuhia mō ia tuhinga.
docInspector.charLimitHint: Whakaatu i te tepe tatau pūāhua ka taea te tautuhia mō ia tuhinga.
docInspector.dueDateHint: Whakaatu i te rā mutunga ka taea te tautuhia mō ia tuhinga.
docInspector.highlightLabel: Tōpuni i ngā kupu raka tepe
docInspector.highlightHint: Tohua ngā kupu i tua atu o te tepe i roto i te ētita.
docInspector.statusStagesHint: Tīpakohia ngā wāhanga ka puta ki te kōwhiri āhua.
docInspector.inheritTooltip: I tīkina mai i ngā tautuhinga whānui

accessibility.title: Āheinga
accessibility.subtitle: Whakaritea te kanohi-mata mō te āhuru me ngā hangarau āwhina. Ka tīmata ia kōwhiri i te wheako o nāianei — kāore he hurihanga tae noa ki tō tīpakohia.

theme.label: Kaupeka me te ātea
theme.hint: Ko ngā kaupeka ātea-nui e tutuki ana ki te paerewa ātea WCAG AAA.

motion.label: Neke
motion.hint: Whakaitia, whakamutu rānei ngā nekehanga kanohi-mata.

textSize.label: Rahi kuputuhi
textSize.hint: Whakarereke i te mata pānui me tuhituhi.

lineSpacing.label: Wātea rārangi
lineSpacing.hint: Tāpiria he manawa i waenga i ngā rārangi kupu.

linkUnderline.label: Taurite i ngā hononga tonu
linkUnderline.hint: Whakaatuhia ngā taurite kia kaua ngā hononga e tūwhiwhia ki tae anake.

focus.label: Tōpuni arotahi kaha ake
focus.hint: Whakamahia he tōwaha matotoru, ātea-nui ake i te arotahi.

reset.label: Whakahoki ki ngā taunoa
reset.hint: Whakahokia te neke, rahi kuputuhi, wātea rārangi, hononga, me te arotahi ki ō taunoa. Kāore e hurihia tō kaupeka.

general.title: Whānui
general.subtitle: Pēhea te puta o LIpsum Writer hei taunoa. Kāore he kino i ēnei.
general.comingSoonBody: Pāpātanga āputa, whakaitia neke, kitea tohu papapātuhi, me te tirohanga e tuwhera ana i te tīmatanga.
general.compactDensityHint: Ngā rārangi piri ake i ngā rārangi, wātea piri ake i ia wāhi.
general.reduceMotionHint: Huri noa i ngā nekehanga i waenga i ngā tirohanga.
general.keyboardHintsHint: Whakaatu i ngā ara ⌘-kī i roto i ngā tūāhoa me ngā kokonga pātene.
general.startupHint: He aha tāu e kite ana i tō whakarite i te tono.

appearance.title: Āhua
appearance.subtitle: Tae, momotuhi, pāpātanga. Te āhua e hiahia ana koe.
appearance.comingSoonBody: Ngā kaupeka tae āhuatia, tae ā-ira, me te pāpātanga. Ko te hurihanga kaupeka o nāianei kei roto i ngā tautuhinga tere o te rēlia ao.
appearance.themeHint: Ngā kaupeka e toru i āhuatia. Ka whakatikatika katoa — ngā tae poraka, ngā aho māuiui, tae noa ki te kiri.
appearance.accentHint: Whakamahia mō te haupū, arotahi, here ētita hohe.

templates.title: Tauira
templates.subtitle: Ngā hanganga ka taea te whakamahi anō mō ngā wāhi me ngā tuhinga hou.
templates.comingSoonBody: Hangaia ōu ake tauira me ngā wāhanga, ngā ingoa tuhinga taunoa, me ngā purapura kupu.

palettes.title: Ngā tae tōpuni
palettes.subtitle: Ngā kaupeka rima-wāhi mō ia wāhi — ingoa me te āta whakarite ia tae.
palettes.comingSoonBody: Whakatikahia, tiakina, me te huri i ngā kaupeka tōpuni ingoa (Taunakitanga, Huri anō, Tohutoro…) i ngā wāhi.

citations.title: Āhua tohu
citations.subtitle: Āhua tohu taunoa i ngā wāhi.
citations.comingSoonBody: Tīpakohia he āhua whānui (Chicago, APA, MLA…) me ngā huri mō ia wāhi.
citations.styleHint: Whakamahia i te tāpiritanga o tētahi tohu hou. Ko ngā huri ā-wāhi ka heke mai.

annotation.title: Ngā tāpirihanga
annotation.subtitle: Ngā menemene tapa me ngā tāpirihanga ā-roto.
annotation.comingSoonBody: Ngā momo tāpirihanga, ngā taunoa kitea, me te āhua kaweake.
annotation.showMarginHint: Ka rewa ngā tāpirihanga ki te taha matau ina rite te wāhi.
annotation.showInlineHint: Ka tatū te tae tāpirihanga ki runga i ngā kupu.
annotation.exportHint: Ka tuhia ngā tāpirihanga tahi me te tinana o te tuhinga.

export.title: Kaweake / Kawemai
export.subtitle: Neke raraunga ki raro me ki runga i LIpsum Writer.
export.comingSoonBody: Kaweake nui ki .zip, kawemai mai i tētahi pōkai LIpsum rānei kōpaki Markdown.
export.formatHint: Ko ngā kaweake ā-tuhinga me ā-wāhi e whakamahi ana i te taunoa kotahi.
export.importHint: Kawemai i tētahi pōkai LIpsum rānei kōpaki kōnae Markdown.
export.importSpaceHint: Kawea mai tētahi wāhi ki tēnei pūtirotiro mai i tētahi pūtea Writer (.zip) — he tikiake tirohanga rānei he kaweake tūhono-kōpaki mai i tētahi atu pūrere.
export.comingSoonHint: Kaweake nui me te kawemai mai i ngā kōpaki Markdown rānei ngā vōti Obsidian.
export.comingSoonTooltip: Kua whakaarohia — kāore anō i rite.

data.title: Ō raraunga
data.subtitle: Kei hea tō mahi e noho ana me tōna rahi.
data.comingSoonBody: Whakamahinga IndexedDB, aromatawai rokiroki, me te mūkahi kotahi.
data.wipeHint: Ka tangohia ngā wāhi, tuhinga, me ngā tirohanga katoa mai i tēnei pūtirotiro. Kāore he whakahoki.

about.title: Mō mātou
about.subtitle: Mōhiohio hanganga me ngā hononga.
about.comingSoonBody: Tirohia te whārangi /about mō te kōrero; ko tēnei ripa ka mau ai mōhiohio hanganga, raihana, me ngā hurihanga.

account.title: Pūkete
account.subtitle: Takiuru, tūhono i ngā pūrere, me ngā wāhi mahi tahi.
account.comingSoonBody: Kāore i rite te tūhono kapua inaianei — ko Lotem he ā-rohe anake. Ka tae te pūkete, takiuru, me ngā wāhi mahi tahi ina tukuna te tūhono.
account.signedOutHint: Kāore anō i rite te tūhono kapua. Kei konei tēnei hei whakaatu i te hoahoa.
account.syncHint: Ina takiuru koe, ka hōkakatia ō wāhi ki ētahi atu pūrere.

typography.title: Momotuhi
typography.subtitle: Ngā taunoa i ngā ao katoa. Ka taea e ngā ao takitahi te huri.
typography.comingSoonBody: Tīpakohia te momotuhi kupu, momotuhi kanohi-mata, rahi pānui taunoa, teitei rārangi, me te ine mō ngā ao hou.

shortcuts.title: Ara Poto
shortcuts.subtitle: Ngā hononga papapātuhi mō te whakahaere, āhua rōpū, me ngā āhua.
shortcuts.comingSoonBody: Ngā ara poto ka taea te huri mō te tuhituhi/pānui/wehewehe, āhua arotahi, me te parekura āhua rōpū.

backups.title: Taurua
backups.subtitle: Kaweakehia, whakahokia, me te tirohanga ō raraunga ā-rohe.
backups.comingSoonBody: Ngā tirohanga ā-rohe ōkawa, kaweake ā-ringaringa ki .zip, me te whakahoki mai i tētahi taurua o mua.
backups.keepHint: Ka tanumia aunoa ngā tirohanga tawhito.

sync.title: Tūhono
sync.subtitle: Tukuna ō wāhi ki tētahi kōpaki e tīpakohia ana e koe. Tohua ki tētahi kōpaki Google Drive, Dropbox, rānei iCloud hei tūhono i ngā pūrere.
sync.unsupportedTitle: Kāore i rite ki tēnei pūtirotiro
sync.unsupportedBody: Me matua whai te tūhono kōpaki i te API Uru Pūnaha Kōnae, e rite ana ki Chrome, Edge, me ētahi atu pūtirotiro Chromium i runga i te papakuoro. Huri ki tētahi pūtirotiro e tautokohia ana hei whakamahi.
sync.folderHint: Ka tuhia ia tūhono i tētahi Markdown .zip mō ia wāhi ki konei, me te mau ana i ngā 5 mutunga me tētahi latest.zip. Ko te Tūhono he mea motuhake i ngā Taurua.
sync.intervalHint: Tōhia te pēhea te auautia o te tūhono aunoa o ngā wāhi i a tuwhera ana te tono me te kōpaki kua hono. Ka taea e ia wāhi te huri i tēnei taunoa.
sync.pushOnlyHint: Ko te tuku anake i nāianei — ka tuhia ō raraunga ā-rohe ki te kōpaki. Ko te tango whakaaro hoki ka heke mai.
sync.reconnectHint: Kua tūāhuke te tūhono — me hiahia anō te pūtirotiro ki te whakaaetanga kōpaki mō tēnei taupānga. Hono anō hei whakahoki i te tūhono ā-ringaringa me te aunoa.

docInspector.title: Tirotiro tuhinga
docInspector.subtitle: Hurihia ngā tautuhinga tirotiro whānui mō tēnei wāhi.

palette.title: Kaupeka tōpuni
palette.subtitle: Ngā tae tōpuni e rima, he ingoa, ka taea te whakarite mō tēnei wāhi.
palette.comingSoonBody: Ingoa hou, tae hou, me te raupapa hou i ngā wāhi tōpuni o tēnei wāhi.

export.title: Kaweake
export.subtitle: Nekehia ngā ihirangi o tēnei wāhi ki tētahi atu tono.
export.comingSoonBody: Kaweake ki Markdown .zip (inaianei mā Taurua), LaTeX, HTML, rānei PDF — katoa ki tētahi wāhi.
export.formatHint: Ko Markdown ka tukuna tuatahi; ko ērā atu ka whai.

general.title: Whānui
general.subtitle: Ngā taipitopito mō tēnei wāhi. Ka tūāpōngia ngā hurihanga ā-ohorere, ka tūhonohia i ngā tirohanga.
general.nameHint: Ka kitea i te upoko taha me te tūāhoa ara wāhi.
general.tagHint: He waehere poto (pūāhua 2–4) ka kitea i runga i te poraka ara wāhi.

sharing.title: Toha
sharing.subtitle: Whakahaere i te pēhea o te toha o tēnei wāhi.
sharing.comingSoonBody: Kitea ā-wāhi me ngā hononga toha. Ka heke mai ina tukuna te tūhono kapua.
sharing.linkHint: Ko te pānui anake hei taunoa. Ka whai ngā tūāhu ētita i ngā Mema.

template.title: Tauira
template.subtitle: Ko te tauira hanga i hangaia ai tēnei wāhi.
template.comingSoonBody: Kāore anō i tautokohia te huri i te tauira wāhi i muri i te hanga. Ka heke mai ina taea te nekeneke i ngā wāhanga me ngā tuhinga.
template.changeHint: Ka whakahōua ngā wāhanga me ngā tuhinga ki te tauira hou.

members.title: Ngā mema
members.subtitle: Ngā kaituhi tahi me ngā kaitirotiro whai uru ki tēnei wāhi.
members.comingSoonBody: Tono kaiwhakamahi, whakahaere mahi, me te arotake hurihanga. Ka heke mai me te tūhono kapua.
members.inviteHint: Ka tukuna e mātou he hononga hei uru ki tēnei wāhi.

backups.title: Taurua
backups.subtitle: Tiakina tēnei wāhi hei .zip ka taea te tikiake, puritia, me te whakahoki.
backups.retentionHint: E mau ana i ngā tirohanga {{count}} hou rawa — ka tangohia aunoa ngā mea tawhito.
backups.empty: Kāore anō he tirohanga — hangaia tētahi mā te + tirohanga ināianei.
backups.deleteConfirm: Mukua tēnei tirohanga? Kāore e taea te whakahoki.
backups.restoreUnavailable: I hangaia tēnei tirohanga i mua o te tautoko whakahoki — ko te tikiake anake e taea ana.
backups.restoreDialogBody: Ka whakakapia ngā ihirangi o nāianei o tēnei wāhi ki te tirohanga. Ka tiakina tētahi tirohanga o te āhua o nāianei i mua, ā, ka taea ai te whakakore i tēnei whakahoki.
backups.fileRestoreTitle: E whakahoki ana mai i tētahi .zip i tikiakehia?
backups.fileRestoreBody: Kawemaia mā ngā Tautuhinga Whānui → Kaweake / Kawemai — ka hoki mai hei wāhi hou, me tēnei wāhi kāore i huri.

sync.title: Tūhono
sync.subtitle: Tukuna tēnei wāhi ki te kōpaki i hono, ā-ringaringa rānei ki tētahi ōkawa. Ko te Tūhono he mea motuhake i ngā Taurua.
sync.folderHint: Honoa tētahi kōpaki i ngā Tautuhinga Whānui → Tūhono. Ko te kōpaki kotahi ka whakamahia mō ngā wāhi katoa.
sync.intervalHint: Tōhia te pēhea te auautia o te tūhono aunoa o tēnei wāhi. Tīpakohia Taunoa hei whai i te tautuhinga tūhono aunoa whānui.

danger.title: Wāhi kino
danger.subtitle: Ngā mahi kāore e huri. Pānuihia āta i mua i te haere tonu.
danger.deleteCardBody: Ka mukua tonu tēnei wāhi me ngā tuhinga katoa, wāhanga, menemene Brain space, tāpirihanga, tohu, me ngā hononga. Kāore e taea te whakahoki.
danger.dialogBody: Ka mukua tonu te wāhi me ōna ihirangi katoa. Kāore e taea te whakahoki.

templates.syncTooltip: Kāore i rite te tūhono kapua — ko tēnei tono he ā-rohe anake i nāianei.

dump.title: Brain space
dump.mobileWarning: Ka pai ake te Brain space i runga i tētahi mata nui ake.
dump.mobileNote: Me matua whai te kānava i tētahi kiore rānei pae.

canvas.emptyHint: tīpakohia he momo kāri i raro
canvas.pendingHint: pāwhiri-shift ki tētahi atu menemene hei hono · esc hei whakakore

drawer.title: Taipitopito menemene
drawer.description: Whakatikahia te menemene kua tīpakohia me te whakahaere i ōna hononga.
drawer.pictureLimitHint: kua tae ki te tepe {{count}} — tangohia tētahi hei tāpiri i tētahi atu.
drawer.connectionsEmpty: pāwhiri-shift ki tētahi atu menemene i runga i te kānava hei hono.

split.title: Tirohanga wehewehe
split.mobileWarning: Me matua whai te tirohanga wehewehe i tētahi mata nui ake.
split.mobileNote: Tuwhera tēnei tuhinga ki te Āhua Tuhituhi.
split.pickDoc: Tīpakohia he tuhinga mai i te tāroaroa i runga ake.

citationsDrawer.title: Ngā tohu
citationsDrawer.description: Rapua, kawemai, me te kaweake ngā tohu mō tēnei wāhi.
citationsDrawer.expand: Tuwhera ngā tohu ki te tirohanga katoa

citations.title: Ngā tohu
citations.searchPlaceholder: ngā kaituhi, ngā tohu, te tau…
citations.noMatch: kāore he rārangi e hāngai ana ki tō rapu.
citations.importHint: kawemaia tētahi .bib, tāpiritia rānei tētahi ā-ringaringa.

edit.duplicateKey: Kua whakamahia kē te tohu "{{key}}" i tēnei wāhi.
edit.confirmDeleteUsed: Ka whakamahia tēnei tohu {{count}}× i ō tuhinga. Mukua tonu?
edit.confirmDeleteSingle: Mukua te tohu "{{key}}"? Kāore e taea te whakahoki.

bulk.setTypeAria: Tautuhia momo mō ngā tohu i tīpakohia
bulk.typeApplied: Kua tautuhia te momo {{type}} ki runga i {{count}} tohu.
bulk.confirmDelete: Mukua {{count}} tohu? Kāore e taea te whakahoki.

row.selectAllAria: Tīpakohia ngā tohu katoa i tēnei whārangi
